text_en: Add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.
Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.
+2 bonus to AC and Dexterity saving throws.
+5 bonus to AC and Dexterity saving throws.
Attacks against you have disadvantage; advantage on Dex saves.
Target takes extra 1d6 necrotic from the caster's attacks.
Marked target takes extra 1d6 damage from the caster's weapon attacks.
Gain temporary hit points each turn; immune to frightened.
